body: Quick reply, will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n- Kelly
subject: Re: Weekly family rundown

body:
Hi,

I wanted to reach out and schedule a time to connect about your student's progress this semester. I've been meeting with several 7th and 8th graders as part of our fall check-ins, and I'd love to carve out 15-20 minutes with you to share some observations and hear how things are going at home.

I have availability Tuesday and Thursday afternoons after 3:30pm. Please let me know what works best for your schedule and I'll send a calendar invite.

Thank you,
Kelly West
School Counselor, Henrico Fields Middle School
subject: Counseling Check-In Appointment

body:
Hey Sharon,

Have you given any more thought to Thanksgiving this year? I know Donna was hoping we could all do it at her place in Short Pump again, but I wanted to check with you before I said yes. If you're driving up from Virginia Beach it would be nice to make a whole weekend of it — maybe you could come Friday and stay through Sunday?

Let me know what you're thinking. The kids would love to see you and I could use the extra hands in the kitchen!

Love,
Kelly
subject: Thanksgiving plans
